name: Mom's Sauerkraut
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the onion into small strips.
2. Heat a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the sliced onions to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until they are lightly browned but not burnt, about 10-12 minutes.
4. Stir in the sauerkraut can contents (including juice) and return to a gentle simmer.
5. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally, until heated through.
6. Serve warm on grilled hot dogs.
